phrases.intent_en: Can I buy the ski pass at the station desk?
phrases.cultural_note: In Swiss ski resorts, ski passes are often available at railway station counters, especially in Zermatt which is car-free and relies on public transport.

phrases.intent_en: Where do I validate my Swiss Travel Pass?
phrases.text_local: Wo kann ich meinen Swiss Travel Pass stempeln lassen?
phrases.cultural_note: Swiss Travel Pass validation is typically handled at dedicated ticket counters or information desks in Swiss train stations. Conductors usually do not validate passes en route.

likely_response.translation_en: Right at the platform with the conductor.

responses.english: Right at the platform with the conductor.

phrases.intent_en: When does the last train to Visp leave?
phrases.text_local: Wann fährt der letzte Zug nach Visp?
phrases.cultural_note: Swiss train schedules are highly precise and published in advance. The last direct connection to Visp from Zermatt is typically in the early evening.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Gornergrat Railway terminus platform?
phrases.text_local: Wo ist der Bahnsteig der Gornergrat-Bahn?
phrases.cultural_note: In Swiss train stations, platforms for regional terminus lines are often clearly marked with the line name. Gornergrat Railway is a prominent local service, so directional signs are typically available.
